creator: sheldonh@uunet.co.za
text:
On Wed, 26 May 1999 22:15:22 +0200, Arjan de Vet wrote:

> My PATH is
> /home/devet/bin:/usr/local/bin:
> /usr/X11R6/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/bin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/usr/sbin
> 
> Running configure with a -x added after #!/bin/sh:
[...]
> + test -f /usr/sbin /usr/sbin/sendmail
> test: syntax error

Right. CURRENT gives me "test: /usr/sbin: binary operator expected", but
I tried it with RELENG_2_2 sources and I get the error message you
provided.

I'll try to reproduce the problem on this side. While I'm doing that,
would you please try with the following PATH:

/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/X11R6/bin

I have no reason but gut feel to suspect your PATH, but it's worth your
checking while I'm looking into it.

Ciao,
Sheldon.
